name: Old-Fashioned Pot Roast II
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Boneless pot roast (rump, chuck or round)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the roast in a Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Add onion soup mix blended with water.
3. Simmer, covered, turning occasionally, for 2 1/2 hours or until tender.
4. If desired, thicken gravy.
Also good (according to their package) with their beefy onion and onion-mushroom soup mixes. Recipe on Lipton's onion soup mix package.
